creator: jin@adv-pc-1.lbl.gov
text:
The package xemacs-19.14.tgz cannot be installed via sysinstall.
	The error is "broken pipe".

How-To-Repeat: 
	Choice	Do post-install configuration of FreeBSD
	from /stand/sysinstall menu
	then choice
		8 Packages           Install pre-packaged software for FreeBSD
	and choice xemacs-19.14 from editors.
	Select OK to start installation. It will hang for a while then say
	broken pipe.
